name: NBA 赛季赛程
description: NBA 完整赛季赛程，涵盖季前赛、常规赛关键节点（赛季开幕、NBA Cup、全明星周末、Play-In 附加赛）以及季后赛每场比赛，全部自动换算为北京时间。
description_en: Complete NBA season schedule covering preseason, regular season, NBA Cup, All-Star Weekend, Play-In Tournament, and every playoff game. Times are converted to Beijing time.
